title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Allcargo Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Allcargo Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
